title: AstraZeneca India South Asia Partners is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: AstraZeneca India South Asia Partners is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
AstraZeneca India South Asia Partners has an exciting opening for a Consultant Physician at our Lucknow office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About AstraZeneca India South Asia Partners:
AstraZeneca India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AstraZeneca India South Asia Partners!
